name: maigret
description: Maigret is an easy-to-use and powerful OSINT tool for collecting a dossier on a person by username only

name: -a
--all-sites
options.description: Use all sites for scan

options.name: --version
options.description: Display version information and dependencies

options.name: --timeout
options.description: Time in seconds to wait for response to requests (default {settings.timeout}s). A longer timeout will be more likely to get results from slow sites. On the other hand, this may cause a long delay to gather all results

options.name: --retries
options.description: Attempts to restart temporarily failed requests

name: -n
--max-connections
options.description: Allowed number of concurrent connections (default {settings.max_connections})

options.name: --no-recursion
options.description: Disable recursive search by additional data extracted from pages

options.name: --no-extracting
options.description: Disable parsing pages for additional data and other usernames

options.name: --id-type
options.description: Specify identifier(s) type (default: username)

options.name: --db
options.description: Load Maigret database from a JSON file or HTTP web resource

options.name: --cookies-jar-file
options.description: File with cookies

options.name: --ignore-ids
options.description: Do not make search by the specified username or other ids

name: -fo
--folderoutput
options.description: If using multiple usernames, the output of the results will be saved to this folder

name: -p
--proxy
options.description: Make requests over a proxy. e.g. socks5://127.0.0.1:1080

options.name: --tor-proxy
options.description: Specify URL of your Tor gateway. Default is socks5://127.0.0.1:9050

options.name: --i2p-proxy
options.description: Specify URL of your I2P gateway. Default is http://127.0.0.1:4444

options.name: --with-domains
options.description: Enable (experimental) feature of checking domains on usernames

options.name: --tags
options.description: Specify tags of sites (see `--stats`)

options.name: --site
options.description: Limit analysis to just the specified sites (multiple option)

options.name: --use-disabled-sites
options.description: Use disabled sites to search (may cause many false positives)

options.name: --parse
options.description: Parse page by URL and extract username and IDs to use for search

options.name: --submit
options.description: URL of existing profile in new site to submit

options.name: --self-check
options.description: Do self check for sites and database and disable non-working ones

options.name: --stats
options.description: Show database statistics (most frequent sites engines and tags)

options.name: --print-not-found
options.description: Print sites where the username was not found

options.name: --print-errors
options.description: Print errors messages: connection, captcha, site country ban, etc

name: -v
--verbose
options.description: Display extra information and metrics

name: -info
--vv
options.description: Display extra/service information and metrics

name: --debug
-vvv
-d
options.description: Display extra/service/debug information and metrics, save responses in debug.log

options.name: --no-color
options.description: Don't color terminal output

options.name: --no-progressbar
options.description: Don't show progressbar

name: -T
--txt
options.description: Create a TXT report (one report per username)

name: -C
--csv
options.description: Create a CSV report (one report per username)

name: -H
--html
options.description: Create an HTML report (one report per username)

name: -X
--xmind
options.description: Create a XMind 8 mindmap report (one report per username)

name: -P
--pdf
options.description: Create a PDF report (one report per username)

name: -G
--graph
options.description: Create a graph report (one report per username)

name: -J
--json
options.description: Generate a JSON report of specific type: simple, ndjson (one report per username)

options.name: --reports-sorting
options.description: Method of results sorting in reports (default: in order of getting the result)
